fact: Bananas are berries. Strawberries are not.
A cloud can weigh more than a million pounds.
Octopuses have three hearts and no mortgage.
A group of flamingos is called a flamboyance.
Your skeleton is always slightly wet.
Scotland's national animal is the unicorn.
Some turtles breathe through their backsides.
A snail can nap for three years.
rather: Would you rather eat a cake—or step on a rake?
Would you rather be a singer—or have cancer?
Would you rather work on a farm—or have three arms?
Would you rather fly with grace—or smell like old lace?
Would you rather be a bee—or have no kidney?
Would you rather be a billionaire—or have no hair?
Would you rather sleep till noon—or argue with the moon?
Would you rather have perfect hair—or fight one angry bear?
Would you rather be a singer—or have cancer?
encourage: You have survived every bad day so far. Suspiciously impressive.
Keep going. Spite is renewable energy.
The void believes in you. Its standards are unclear.
You can do this. Panic later; schedule it.
Be the plot twist your problems did not budget for.
Rest if you must. Even villains need a dramatic pause.
Your chaos has excellent long-term potential.
Today is temporary. So is that awkward thing you said.
Rise and shine. Or rise and brood productively.
The bar is low. Step over it with theatrical confidence.
